function.message: I couldn’t complete this safely because the inbox request names two projects (“do-not-degrade lane” and “attic rainwater rig”) that I cannot match to canonical project records in `40_projects/` to verify start dates. Please provide the exact project folder names (or confirm aliases) so I can compare dates and delete the correct one.
function.rulebook_notes: Used process-next-inbox workflow, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, verified against canonical project lane, and avoided mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The task requires comparing project start dates and deleting one project, but searches in `/40_projects` found no canonical matches for either requested name. Without an unambiguous mapping to project `README.MD` records, completing deletion would require guessing, which the rulebook forbids.
completed_steps_laconic: search / for attic rainwater rig and do-not-degrade variants
